"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\my_compiler.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\my_compiler.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\my_compiler.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\my_compiler.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o my_compiler.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmy_compiler.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\my_compiler.dir\linkLibs.rsp
